Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hollow Spear]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The Hollow Spear is a Striker technique that uses a hyper-compressed beam of pure madra to stab through madra-based defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan launched a Hollow King’s Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Hollow King’s Spear is a lance of pure madra that conducts willpower well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Eithan threw a Hollow Spear at the Blood Sage.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Hollow King’s Spear is a Striker technique used by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Spear of the Hollow King and breath of a black dragon struck the Wandering Titan in the eye.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — The Hollow Spear is an advanced weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — The Hollow Spear technique is a blend of sacred instrument and Striker technique.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Hollow King's Spear pierced the serpentine dragon as a Striker technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
